recommendations.title: Terrifier
recommendations.overview: A maniacal clown named Art terrorizes three young women on Halloween night and everyone else who stands in his way.

recommendations.title: Terrifier
recommendations.overview: After witnessing a brutal murder on Halloween night, a young woman becomes the next target of a maniacal entity.

recommendations.title: Terrifier 2
recommendations.overview: A year after the Miles County massacre, Art the Clown is resurrected by a sinister entity. Art returns home, where he must hunt down and destroy teenage Sienna and her younger brother Jonathan on Halloween. As the body count rises, the siblings fight

recommendations.title: Terrifier 3
recommendations.overview: Five years after surviving Art the Clown's Halloween massacre, Sienna and Jonathan are still struggling to rebuild their shattered lives. As the holiday season approaches, they try to embrace the Christmas spirit and leave the horrors of the past beh

recommendations.title: All Hallows' Eve 2
recommendations.overview: A woman finds a VHS tape on her doorstep that shows a series of gruesome tales that could be real. But the true danger is the pumpkin-faced killer that's using the tape to find his next victim.
recommendations.director: Jon Kondelik, Ryan Patch, Marc Roussel, Elias Benavidez, Mike Kochansky, Andrés Borghi, James Kondelik, Bryan Norton, Antonio Padovan, Jay Holben

recommendations.title: Ring
recommendations.overview: A mysterious video has been linked to a number of deaths, and when an inquisitive journalist finds the tape and views it herself, she sets in motion a chain of events that puts her own life in danger.

recommendations.title: Mr. Crocket
recommendations.overview: A single mother thinks she's found the key to calming her child down – a VHS copy of a strange children's program named Mr. Crocket's World. However, a darker, bloodier secret waits to invade their home from inside the tape.

recommendations.title: Hocus Pocus
recommendations.overview: After 300 years of slumber, three sister witches are accidentally resurrected in Salem on Halloween night, and it is up to three kids and their newfound feline friend to put an end to the witches' reign of terror once and for all.

recommendations.title: Rent-A-Pal
recommendations.overview: Set in 1990, a lonely bachelor named David searches for an escape from the day-to-day drudgery of caring for his aging mother.  While seeking a partner through a video dating service, he discovers a strange VHS tape called Rent-A-Pal. Hosted by the c

recommendations.title: Electrick Children
recommendations.overview: Rachel is a rambunctious girl from a polygamist colony in southern Utah. On Rachel’s 15th birthday, she finds a forbidden cassette tape. Having never seen anything like it before, Rachel plays the cassette tape, and finds glorious rock & roll thereup
